name: Orzo with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 small Zucchini, quartered lengthwise, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook orzo according to package directions.
2. Bring vegetable broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
3. Add vegetables (zucchini, carrot, onion, eggplant) to the boiling broth and sauté until done to your liking (5-10 minutes).
4. Drain the orzo and add it to the vegetables.
5. Continue cooking until it reaches your desired temperature.
6. Optionally, top with low-fat cheese if desired.
